=====On hand===== {{anchor|Goodra 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |width=68 |pkmn=Goodra |type1=Dragon |img=Raihan Goodra TW.png |epnum=TW07 |epname=Sky |vajp= |vaen=List of English voice actors{{!}}Allegra Clark |desc={{p|Goodra}} was the first Pokémon used by Raihan during his battle against [[Leon]]. It went up against Leon's {{p|Aegislash}}, but it was unable to defeat it. Goodra's known moves are {{m|Surf}} and {{m|Thunder}}.}} {{anchor|Flygon 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |pkmn=Flygon |type1=Ground |type2=Dragon |img=Raihan Flygon TW.png |epnum=TW07 |epname=Sky |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Flygon}} was used during the battle between Leon and Raihan. It defeated Leon's Aegislash and then went up against his {{p|Dragapult}}. It reappeared in ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]''. Flygon's known moves are {{m|Stone Edge}} and {{m|Draco Meteor}}.}} {{anchor|Duraludon 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |pkmn=Duraludon |giga=yes |type1=Steel |type2=Dragon |img=Raihan Gigantamax Duraludon TW.png |cap=Raihan's Gigantamax Duraludon |epnum=TW07 |epname=Sky |vajp= |vaen= |desc={{p|Duraludon}} was the last Pokémon used by Raihan during the battle. It went up against Leon's Gigantamax {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}. None of Duraludon's moves are known{{tt|*|Duraludon is implied to know a status move due to the use of Max Guard}}.
As a Gigantamax Duraludon, it can use {{m|Max Guard}}.}}
